reviews.review_msg: Easy going, posts detailed and amazing lectures with slides that can be reviewed later too just to re-enforce learning. Too many details but tests are easier than the actual material. Always available to help with course material. If one watches his lectures and pay attention A+ is yours! Will always choose his class. Highly suggested

His 1st time teaching this course, he originally teaches Bisc333. His exams are somewhat fair, though written parts are rather general and less detailed, 2nd mt avg was 10% lower than the first one. Lectures are good with decent notes in powerpoints. And a funny guy. Textbook will help u understand the material better, not to mention problem sets.
